summary: Comprehensive backend pytest (43 tests, 41 pass, 1 skip, 1 fail) + frontend smoke test. Found ONE confirmed P0 backend bug (PATCH /api/users/me unreachable due to FastAPI route-ordering — /users/{uid} admin-only catches 'me' before /users/me). New test coverage added for SSE messaging, S3 attach-url presigned PUT, CSV export, status history, deferred reminders, ObjectId leak sweep across 9 endpoints. Frontend Admin & CPA login redirects verified; AppHeader avatar dropdown (logout, account settings) appears MISSING/non-functional — could not log out via UI on any role. /account page rendered but no 2FA placeholder text found. SSE messaging connects with ?token= query param (text/event-stream) and rejects without token. No ObjectId leaks found anywhere. CSV export returns proper CSV for admin and 403 for client.

critical.issue: Route is unreachable for non-admin users. Declared at server.py:1561 AFTER PATCH /api/users/{uid} at server.py:323 (require_role ADMIN). FastAPI matches in declaration order so /users/me hits /users/{uid} with uid='me' and returns 403 'Insufficient role'. Blocks Client/CPA/WS from updating their own notification_prefs, name, phone, corporation. FIX: move @api.patch('/users/me') and @api.get('/users/me/full') ABOVE @api.patch('/users/{uid}') in server.py.

minor.issue: 6th failed attempt sometimes returns 401 instead of 429. Identifier is 'ip:email' and behind the Cloudflare ingress request.client.host may vary across calls, defeating per-IP lockout. Consider trusting X-Forwarded-For header or locking by email-only with stricter window.

Review request lists endpoints that do not exist: PATCH /api/engagements/{eid}/assign-cpa, PATCH /api/engagements/{eid}/checklist, PATCH /api/users/me/preferences, GET /api/status-history, POST /api/documents/upload-url. Actual endpoints are: PATCH /api/engagements/{eid} (set assigned_cpa_id), PATCH /api/engagements/{eid}/pre-filing-checklist, PATCH /api/users/me, GET /api/engagements/{eid}/history, POST /api/documents/{doc_id}/upload-url. All actual endpoints work — naming docs should be updated.

ui_bugs.issue: Avatar dropdown does not open / has no Logout or Account Settings menu items. Clicking the avatar (initials + name) shows no popover. After logging in as Admin/CPA we could not sign out via UI — had to clear localStorage manually. Role badge IS visible (e.g., 'Admin', 'CPA workspace') but dropdown trigger is missing.

Page loads but no 2FA placeholder text matched (regex /2FA|two[- ]factor/). Either the page is missing the 2FA section or copy uses different wording. Notification toggles state not verified end-to-end (also blocked by PATCH /users/me bug above).

integration_issues.issue: Even if UI form exists, the PATCH /api/users/me backend route is shadowed by /users/{uid} (admin-only) → 403 for Client. Save will fail until route order is fixed.

action_items: FIX P0: Reorder routes in /app/backend/server.py — move @api.patch('/users/me') and @api.get('/users/me/full') ABOVE @api.patch('/users/{uid}'). Add a guard `if uid == 'me': raise 404` in the admin route.
FIX P1: AppHeader avatar dropdown — wire onClick handler to show menu with 'Account Settings' link and 'Logout' button. Add data-testid='header-avatar', 'header-account-link', 'header-logout-button'.
FIX P1: Client /account page — add 2FA placeholder section (Card or section labelled 'Two-factor authentication') and notification preference toggles bound to PATCH /api/users/me.
FIX P2: Brute-force lockout behind ingress — switch identifier to email-only or trust X-Forwarded-For.
DOCS: Update review request endpoint names to match actual server.py routes.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1613 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into modules: routes_auth.py, routes_engagements.py, routes_documents.py, routes_messages.py, routes_metrics.py.
Route declaration order issue (PATCH /users/me shadowed) indicates absence of route-collision tests — add a smoke test that hits every documented endpoint as the role expected to use it.
ObjectId exclusion is consistently applied (verified across 9 endpoints) — good.
SSE /messages/stream correctly accepts ?token= query param and returns text/event-stream — matches EventSource browser limitation.
Brute-force identifier `f'{ip}:{email}'` may be ineffective behind Cloudflare ingress where request.client.host can be a single proxy IP (or rotate). Consider using X-Forwarded-For first hop.
Two test functions return values instead of asserting (test_create_opportunity, test_invite_user_creates_user_and_link) → pytest warnings. Cosmetic but should be cleaned up.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_cloudtax_api.py (added 11 new tests: TestMessaging x5, TestCsvExport x2, TestRemindDeferred x1, TestStatusHistory x1, TestUserPreferences x1, TestObjectIdLeak x1; relaxed seed-count assertions from ==10 to >=10)

success_rate.backend: 95% (41/43 passed, 1 skipped (status-change to IN_PREP — already in IN_PREP), 1 failed (route-ordering bug))
success_rate.frontend: 60% (Admin and CPA login redirects work; WS/Client redirects verified via backend; logout/avatar dropdown missing; /account 2FA missing)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@cloudtax.ca / CloudTax2026! | CPA: pallavi@cloudtax.ca | WS: henry.ziegler@wealthsimple.com | Client: chen@example.com — all use CloudTax2026!
seed_data_creation: 14 engagements found (10 originally seeded + 4 added by previous WS Add Client modal smoke). Seed is idempotent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_cloudtax_api.py covers Health, Auth (login×4 roles, me, logout, brute-force), RBAC (CPA filter, WS doc deny, Client tier-redact), Engagements (list, get-enriched, status patch), Documents (list, presigned URL), Opportunities (create, share, WS view), Time entries, Checklist (list, toggle), Metrics (pilot, economics admin-only, utilization), Users (invite, dup-409, toggle-active), Messaging (post/list, attach-url, unread-count, SSE stream + reject-no-token), CSV export (admin, client-deny), Remind-deferred (cooldown), Status history (no _id leak), User preferences (CURRENTLY FAILING — route-order bug), ObjectId leak sweep across 9 endpoints. Run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://health-wealth-tax.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest backend/tests/test_cloudtax_api.py -v. After main agent fixes route ordering, all 42 tests should pass (1 skipped is environmental — no INTAKE engagement available since seed.py creates more advanced statuses).

rca_of_issue.bug: PATCH /api/users/me returns 403 'Insufficient role' for any non-admin user.
rca_of_issue.rca: FastAPI matches paths in route-decorator declaration order. server.py:323 declares `@api.patch('/users/{uid}', dependencies=require_role('ADMIN'))` BEFORE server.py:1561 `@api.patch('/users/me')`. A request to /users/me is captured by /users/{uid} with uid='me' before reaching the dedicated /me handler. The require_role('ADMIN') dep then 403s any non-admin caller.
rca_of_issue.reproduction: 1) Login as chen@example.com → get token. 2) PATCH /api/users/me with {notification_prefs: {...}} and Bearer token. 3) Observe 403 'Insufficient role'.
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Move @api.patch('/users/me') and @api.get('/users/me/full') ABOVE @api.patch('/users/{uid}') and @api.get('/users/{uid}') in server.py. Optionally also `if uid == 'me': raise HTTPException(404)` defensively in the admin handler.

mocked_apis.client_account_2fa: 2FA toggle in Account Settings is documented as UI placeholder only — confirmed no backend logic exists. Page may also be missing the placeholder UI altogether.
mocked_apis.aws_ses: Sandbox — deferred reminder send may fail silently (returns email_sent=false) but does not crash backend.
mocked_apis.aws_s3: Presigned PUT URLs generate successfully. Browser CORS upload not validated end-to-end (out of scope per instructions).
